FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fa94e25b600>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:45:37Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:43:54Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:45:37Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:43:54Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199259761 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199379088 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199379629 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199388662 new$encoding <- encoding

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199398046 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199398466 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199411005 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199411766 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199426057 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199426758 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199441320 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199441981 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199471755 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199496121 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199496842 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199514268 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199515019 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199531964 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199532405 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199543541 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199543962 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199554648 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199555108 "default"))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199569760 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199570471 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199585073 }
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199585814 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199600996 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199601847 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199612563 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199623059 }
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199623559 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199632312 }
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199632743 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199641246 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199641706 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199656428 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199657219 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199672993 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199673704 }
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199686963 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199687634 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 21:47:18.199700413 }

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199709597 "2.0")

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199729666 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199760993 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/12 21:47:18.199791478 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
